methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.sparse_outlier.SparseOutlierDecomposer.patch_module
documentation: Patch module to decompose its weight matrices into inlier and outlier components

Patches supported torch.nn.Module instances to decompose the weight matrices into
inlier and outlier components and to compress the sparse outlier components in Core ML

class_variables.name: argmaxtools.nn.AttentionHeadType.MultiHead
documentation: MHA: https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762

class_variables.name: argmaxtools.nn.AttentionHeadType.GroupQuery
documentation: GQA: https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.13245

class_variables.name: argmaxtools.nn.AttentionHeadType.MultiQuery
documentation: MQA: https://arxiv.org/pdf/1911.02150

classes.name: argmaxtools.nn.Attention

methods.name: argmaxtools.nn.Attention.__init__
documentation:
Args:
    embed_dim:          Number of embedding dimensions
    n_heads:            Number of attention heads
    attention_type:     Attention type
    n_kv_heads:         MHA if None, GQA if 1<n_kv_heads<n_heads
                        and MQA if n_kv_heads=1

methods.name: argmaxtools.nn.Attention._maybe_tile
documentation: Tile key and value tensors before _sdpa() if head_type is GQA or MQA

methods.name: argmaxtools.nn.Attention._qkv_proj
documentation: Compute qkv projections prescribed by currently active input configurations

methods.name: argmaxtools.nn.Attention._finalize_kv
documentation:
Determine the key and value tensors based on attention type. If head_type is GQA or MQA,
repeat key and value tensors to match the query tensor embedding dimensionality.

methods.name: argmaxtools.nn.Attention._sdpa
documentation: Compute Scaled Dot Product Attention
Argmax reference attention implementation

classes.name: argmaxtools.nn.LayerNorm
documentation: Reference:
https://github.com/apple/ml-ane-transformers/blob/main/ane_transformers/reference/layer_norm.py

functions.name: argmaxtools.finetune.lora.update_model_
documentation:
In-place replaces layers with palettized LoRA layers according to the recipe.

Args:
    model: The model to update
    recipe: The palettization recipe
    rank: Rank of LoRA

functions.name: argmaxtools.finetune.lora.loftp_
documentation:
Args:
    w: Weight matrix with shape (m, n, 1, 1).
    loraA: LoRA A matrix with shape (rank, m, 1, 1)
    loraB: LoRA B matrix with shape (n, rank, 1, 1).
    T: Alternating step for the LoftQ algorithm.
    nbits: Number of bits for palettization.

classes.name: argmaxtools.finetune.lora.PalettizedLoRAConv2d

methods.name: argmaxtools.finetune.lora.PalettizedLoRAConv2d.loftp_
documentation:
Args:
    w: Weight matrix with shape (m, n, 1, 1).
    loraA: LoRA A matrix with shape (rank, m, 1, 1)
    loraB: LoRA B matrix with shape (n, rank, 1, 1).
    T: Alternating step for the LoftQ algorithm.
    nbits: Number of bits for palettization.

Args:
    module: `nn.Conv2d` layer module to adapt.
    rank: The rank of the approximation.
    nbits: Number of bits for palettization.
    alpha: Scaling parameter.
    dtype: `torch.float32` is supported.
    palettize_weight: Only LoRA modules are attached if set to `False`.
    lora_init: Type of initialization for LoRA modules.
        `regular`: Regular initialization written on the LoRA paper.
        `loftp.T`: LoftQ initialization with `T` steps.
    (LoftQ paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.08659)

modules.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize
documentation: For licensing see accompanying LICENSE.md file.
Copyright (C) 2023 Argmax, Inc. All Rights Reserved.

functions.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize._get_compressible_modules
documentation: Returns a list of submodules that have "weight" parameters of at least min_numel to compress

functions.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize._fake_palettize
documentation:
Simulate weight palettization in PyTorch without changing the actual
precision mirroring coremltools implementation
Copied from:
https://github.com/apple/coremltools/blob/7.0b1/coremltools/optimize/coreml/_quantization_passes.py#L423

classes.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.init_model_and_test_data
documentation:
Initializes the model to analyze for compression and a single batch of test
data to quickly measure the end-to-end impact of various compression functions

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.default_dtype
documentation: The default weight and activation precision for the model

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.divergence_fn
documentation: Quantifies the difference across original and compressed model outputs

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.__init__
documentation:
Args:
    model_version:  String that identifies the model configuration. This is generally
                    the name of the model as published on huggingface.co/models
    cache_dir:      Intermediate compressed artifacts will be cached to this directory
                    for rapid recipe generation and warm restarts. Cache size might exceed
                    original model size!

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.compute_divergence
documentation: Quantify the impact of compression_fn on end-to-end model function

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.fake_palettize
documentation:
Apply nbits-bit palettization to the parameter tensor without
changing the numerical precision

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.profile_per_layer_response
documentation:
Computes the end-to-end divergence observed while palettizing
with nbits one layer at a time

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.profile_cumulative_response
documentation:
Computes the end-to-end divergence observed while palettizing
with an increasing number of layers with nbits

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.profile_mixed_bit_response
documentation: Generate mixed-bit recipes via per-layer divergence thresholding

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer._sanity_check_per_layer_results
documentation: Ensure per-layer results consistently decrease with increasing precision

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.apply_recipe_torch
documentation:
Given a (potentially mixed-bit) per-layer nbits recipe, fake palettizes
self.model in-place to simulate the impact

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.convert_current_model_to_coreml
documentation: Converts the current state of self.model to Core ML

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.apply_recipe_coreml
documentation:
Given a layer name to nbits precision recipe,
compress the input coreml_model

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.restore_pristine_model
documentation: Restores full pristine model

methods.name: argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer.plot
documentation: Plot cumulative results per bit precision and mixed-bit recipe results

Abstract class that defines the template for Mixed-Bit Palettization
of `torch.nn.Module` derived models

functions.name: argmaxtools.finetune.enc_dec_qlora_finetuner.decompose_model_
documentation: Sparse outlier decomposition for the given model and recipe.

functions.name: argmaxtools.finetune.enc_dec_qlora_finetuner.divergence_fn
documentation:
WhisperTextDecoder emits logits over a token vocabulary. The function
used to quantify output change is KL divergence (lower the better)

classes.name: argmaxtools.test_utils.CoreMLTestsMixin

methods.name: argmaxtools.test_utils.CoreMLTestsMixin.test_torch2coreml_correctness_and_speedup
documentation:
Coverage:
- Torchscript tracing for test torch model
- PyTorch to Core ML conversion
- Core ML output correctness wrt original PyTorch model
- Core ML speedup on TEST_COMPUTE_UNIT vs CPU_ONLY
- Core ML speedup pre- vs post-weight compression

Mixin class for PyTorch to Core ML conversion,
correctness and speedup testing

classes.name: argmaxtools.test_utils.CoreMLPalettizerTestsMixin

methods.name: argmaxtools.test_utils.CoreMLPalettizerTestsMixin.test_profile_response
documentation:
Coverage:
- Per-layer palettization
- Cumulative palettization
- Mixed-bit palettization

methods.name: argmaxtools.test_utils.CoreMLPalettizerTestsMixin.test_palettized_torch2coreml_conversion_and_correctness
documentation:
Coverage:
- Fake palettization of torch models
(change values only, keep original precision)
- Fake palettized torch2coreml conversion
- Real palettization of Core ML models
- End-to-end correctness checks

Mixin class for testing `argmaxtools.compress.palettize.Palettizer`
and derived classes
